scripts.preinstall: if [ "$SKIP_PREINSTALL" != "true" ]; then node -e "if(process.env.npm_execpath.indexOf('pnpm') === -1) throw new Error('You must use pnpm to install dependencies')"; else echo 'Skipping preinstall script'; fi
scripts.serve: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true next start
scripts.start: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true next dev
scripts.start:visualizer: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true next dev
scripts.start:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next dev
scripts.start:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next dev
scripts.build: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=staging INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true NEXT_PRIVATE_LOCAL_WEBPACK=true next build
scripts.build:visualizer: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=staging INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true next build
scripts.build:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=staging INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=staging INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:stg-dev: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=staging INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true next build
scripts.build:stg-dev:visualizer: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=staging INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true next build
scripts.build:stg-dev:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=staging INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:stg-dev:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=staging INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:dev: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true next build
scripts.build:dev:visualizer: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true next build
scripts.build:dev:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:dev:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=development APP_ENV=development INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:beta: cross-env BE_ENV=beta APP_ENV=beta INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true next build
scripts.build:beta:visualizer: cross-env BE_ENV=beta APP_ENV=beta INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true next build
scripts.build:beta:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=beta APP_ENV=beta INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:beta:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=beta APP_ENV=beta INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:beta-stg: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=beta INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true next build
scripts.build:beta-stg:visualizer: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=beta INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true next build
scripts.build:beta-stg:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=beta INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:beta-stg:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=beta INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:prod: cross-env BE_ENV=production APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true next build
scripts.build:prod:visualizer: cross-env BE_ENV=production APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true next build
scripts.build:prod:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=production APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:prod:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=production APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:prod-beta: cross-env BE_ENV=beta APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true next build
scripts.build:prod-beta:visualizer: cross-env BE_ENV=beta APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true next build
scripts.build:prod-beta:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=beta APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:prod-beta:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=beta APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:prod-stg: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true next build
scripts.build:prod-stg:visualizer: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true next build
scripts.build:prod-stg:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.build:prod-stg:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env BE_ENV=staging APP_ENV=production INCLUDE_FEDERATION=true INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true next build
scripts.lint: pnpm lint-js "**/*.{mjs,cjs,js,jsx,mdx}" && pnpm lint-css "**/*.{css,scss}" && pnpm prettier --check .
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm lint-js:fix "**/*.{mjs,cjs,js,jsx,mdx}" && pnpm lint-css:fix "**/*.{css,scss}" && pnpm prettier:fix .
scripts.storybook:build:visualizer:buildStats: cross-env STORY_ENV=staging INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true storybook build
scripts.storybook:build:beta:visualizer:buildSta: cross-env STORY_ENV=beta INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true storybook build
scripts.storybook:build:prod:visualizer:buildSta: cross-env STORY_ENV=production INCLUDE_VISUALIZER=true INCLUDE_BUILD_STATS=true storybook build
